message:
fix(core): log status update failures after command execution

Previously, errors from UpdateRequestStatus and UpdateRequestExecution
calls after command completion were silently discarded with `_ = ...`.
This could leave requests in an inconsistent state (e.g., stuck in
EXECUTING) without any indication of why the status update failed.

Now these calls log warnings to stderr matching the existing pattern
at line 204. The command execution result is still returned (we don't
fail the overall operation), but operators can see if DB updates failed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
